description: Composition Blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, keyhole opening with a buttoned closure at the back and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Show your romantic side and your love for the brand with this stylish T-shirt from lee. The graphic print adds to your femininity while the soft cotton fabric will keep you fresh all day. Pair this tee with denims and slip-on shoes for a girlie look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
